# MDE 1.3.10

## Features

- Added first-class YAML frontmatter handling for Markdown files.
- Rendered frontmatter as a compact metadata panel above the editor instead of sending it into the BlockNote document body.
- Added expandable raw YAML viewing and editing, with saves recomposing the YAML header and Markdown body without reserializing the metadata.
- Added invalid YAML detection so malformed frontmatter stays editable and preserved while the Markdown body remains usable.
- Marked workspace search matches from frontmatter as metadata hits while keeping editor-local search focused on the document body.
- Updated AI summary and translation flows to process Markdown body content by default instead of frontmatter metadata.

## Bug Fixes

- Prevented YAML frontmatter from being rendered as large document content.
- Preserved raw frontmatter ordering, comments, indentation, and line endings when editing only the Markdown body.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added shared frontmatter parsing and recomposition helpers backed by `js-yaml` validation.
- Added a Vitest localStorage fallback for environments where Node exposes an incomplete Storage object.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E coverage for frontmatter rendering, editing, saving, search labeling, and AI body-only generation.

## Verification

- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS Apple Silicon DMG and ZIP
- macOS Intel DMG and ZIP
- Windows x64 NSIS installer
